focus: correctness -- pass D: sk-prompt goal enhancement + system-spec-kit integration + command sweep

findingDetails.title: Prompt enhancement metadata omits the required RICCE marker
findingDetails.claim: Phase 007 requires stored prompt metadata to name RICCE, but the plugin metadata shape omits any RICCE marker.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Searched .opencode/plugins/mk-goal.js for RICCE/ricce and reviewed generated and normalized promptEnhancement fields.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: The prompt body is RICCE-style, but the acceptance criterion requires stored metadata naming RICCE.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if phase 007 is amended to require only RICCE-style prompt structure, not a stored metadata marker.

findingDetails.title: Command contract says unknown verbs fail, but executable instructions treat every unknown non-empty query as a set objective

spec_code.notes: Phase 007 has one metadata mismatch; phase 008 runtime boundary matched absence of plugin-level spec-kit hooks.

checklist_evidence.notes: Level 1 phase folders do not include checklist.md.

export_loader_contract.notes: Default export with __test matches export-contract test.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Non-trivial plugin, command, and phase-spec correctness audit over persisted state and user-facing command behavior.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Prompt pack named pass-D focus targets and scope files.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Stored prompt enhancement metadata may not satisfy phase 007's named sk-prompt concepts.

searchActions.result: promptEnhancement contains version, methodology, mode, framework, perspectives, clearScore, clearBreakdown, maxChars, charCount; no RICCE marker.

searchLedger.rationale: Acceptance criterion requires stored metadata naming RICCE, but no plugin metadata field does.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Phase 008 may imply runtime hooks into system-spec-kit workflows that the plugin should implement.
searchLedger.rationale: Phase 008 explicitly scopes runtime code changes out; absence of plugin-level spec-kit hooks is not a correctness mismatch.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: documentation-integration phase excludes runtime mk-goal.js changes

searchLedger.hypothesis: The command markdown may describe router failure behavior that the executable dispatch cannot produce.

searchActions.result: contract says unsupported verbs fail, while dispatch step routes every other non-empty query to set.
plugin supports a fixed enum action set and defaults invalid internal actions to show.

searchLedger.rationale: The markdown contract and executable routing path disagree for unknown leading tokens.

searchLedger.invariant: The plugin module exports only a default function and exposes test helpers on default.__test.

searchActions.result: test asserts Object.keys(pluginModule) is ['default'], default is a function, and default.__test exists.
plugin exports default function MkGoalPlugin and attaches __test before module end.

searchLedger.rationale: Export shape and loader contract match the test.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct read of export and test assertion

title: Prompt enhancement metadata omits the required RICCE marker
Command contract says unknown verbs fail, but executable instructions treat every unknown non-empty query as a set objective

reason: Phase 008 explicitly excludes runtime code changes, and exact plugin search found no spec-kit workflow hooks to reconcile.

detail: Phase 007 metadata mismatch found; phase 008 runtime boundary matched scoped plugin behavior.
